Rule.name: Toolkit-CustomSchemaMapping
Rule.Description:
Maps non-standard source system attributes into the normalized IIQ schema. Each application can have its own attribute name mappings configured in the schemaMappings map below. Unmapped attributes pass through unchanged.
Trigger: Fires during aggregation when building the resource object map. Variables in scope: context (SailPointContext), map (Map of account attributes), application (Application), schema (Schema).
